overview: Rose Dating is a romantic social platform on the Internet Computer featuring user profiles, posts, stories, direct and group chats, and a tokenized Rose Credits economy. Elegant rose-themed UI with PWA support.
features: Group video messaging with device uploads
Story highlights — pin stories to your profile permanently
Unified MIME type media support across all chats, groups, and stories
Direct and group chats with expiring media
Rose Credits in-app economy with dealer marketplace
User profiles with QR code sharing
